name: productivity
description: Portable, general-purpose productivity skills for any Claude Code workflow: open a fresh chat in a new tab (breakout), hand the conversation off to a new agent (handoff), and get a plan stress-tested through relentless interview (grill-me).

interface.shortDescription: Portable helpers: fresh-chat breakout, conversation handoff, plan grilling.
interface.longDescription: Portable, general-purpose productivity skills for any workflow: breakout opens a fresh chat in a new tab, handoff compacts the conversation into a document a new agent can pick up, and grill-me stress-tests a plan or design through relentless interview until the decisions are settled.
